messages.content: In the file /Users/maxpetrusenko/Desktop/Gauntlet/ship-refactored/CONTRIBUTING.md, add a single line at the very end that says: <!-- shipyard-test-run -->

I hit an error while handling this request: 404 This is not a chat model and thus not supported in the v1/chat/completions endpoint. Did you mean to use v1/completions?. I can retry with a focused fix plan.

## Suggested Next Steps
- Inspect failure [recommended]: Review the error and tool output before retrying.
  Prompt: Summarize the failure root cause and propose a concrete fix plan.
- Retry with fix: Retry run with explicit feedback constraints.
  Prompt: Retry this task and fix the reported failure first.
